# Alfa Construction Inc

> Professional siding installation, window & door installation, carpentry, and home remodeling services across Massachusetts. Licensed (#192348) & insured contractor with 18+ years of experience serving 109 cities. 5.0/5.0 Google rating. Specializing in Hardie Plank fiber cement siding, vinyl siding, and complete exterior renovations.

## Company Details

- **Legal Name:** Alfa Construction Inc
- **Owner:** Fabio (Lead Contractor, 18+ years experience)
- **Founded:** 2006
- **License:** Massachusetts Construction License #192348 (valid through 04/2027)
- **Insurance:** Fully insured for residential and commercial projects
- **Phone:** (508) 596-3750
- **Email:** info@alfapaintingcarpentry.com
- **Address:** 50 Mechanic St, Bellingham, MA 02019
- **Coordinates:** 42.0687, -71.4748
- **Service Area:** 109 cities across Massachusetts & Southern New Hampshire
- **Languages:** English, Portuguese
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Rating:** 5.0/5.0 on Google (22+ verified reviews)

## Services (ordered by specialty)

- [Siding Installation & Repair](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/siding): Hardie Plank fiber cement, vinyl siding, cedar shingles, board and batten, shake siding, and complete siding replacement. Our #1 specialty.
- [Window & Door Installation](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/windows-doors): Energy-efficient window replacement, Andersen windows, storm doors, entry doors, sliding glass doors, and bay windows.
- [Carpentry & Trim Work](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/carpentry): Custom trim, crown molding, wainscoting, door installation, deck construction, porch repairs, and structural carpentry.
- [Home Remodeling & Renovation](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/remodeling): Kitchen remodeling, bathroom renovation, basement finishing, additions, and whole-home renovation.
- [Interior & Exterior Painting](https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/painting): Complete residential painting including surface preparation, priming, caulking, and finish coating.
